subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of Bahá unto His servant, that He may sever him from all who are in the heavens and on earth, and draw him nigh unto a wondrous and transcendent Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر البهاء عبده لینقطعه عن کل من فی السموات و الارض و یقربه الی جمال بدع علیا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of the Manifestation of God
